// src/pages/HomePage.js import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { useSensor } from '../hooks/useSensor'; import './HomePage.css'; const HomePage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { user } = useAuth(); const { status, loading } = useSensor(); const [activePlan, setActivePlan] = useState('guardian'); const healthPlans = [ { id: 'guardian', name: 'Guardian Care', tagline: 'Major Medical & Emergency Cover', description: 'Comprehensive coverage for major medical events, emergencies, advanced imaging, private hospitalisation, surgery, cancer treatment, and international evacuations.', features: [ 'Emergency Services', 'Advanced Imaging', 'Private Hospitalisation', 'Surgery Coverage', 'Cancer Treatment', 'International Evacuations' ], price: 'From $89/month', color: '#4f2f7c', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)', icon: '🛡️' }, { id: 'access', name: 'Access Care', tagline: 'Essential Healthcare Cover', description: 'Emergency services, hospital admissions, consultations with doctors and specialists, diagnostic imaging, and outpatient treatment for acute illnesses.', features: [ 'Emergency Services', 'Hospital Admissions', 'Doctor Consultations', 'Specialist Visits', 'Diagnostic Imaging', 'Outpatient Treatment' ], price: 'From $47/month', color: '#2c3e50', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #3498db 0%, #2c3e50 100%)', icon: '🚪' }, { id: 'vantage', name: 'Vantage Care', tagline: 'Comprehensive Wellness Cover', description: 'Management of chronic conditions, maternity care, dental services, optical equipment, wellness programs, and preventative care services.', features: [ 'Chronic Condition Management', 'Maternity Care', 'Dental Services', 'Optical Equipment', 'Wellness Programs', 'Preventative Care' ], price: 'From $140/month', color: '#27ae60', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #27ae60 0%, #2ecc71 100%)', icon: '⭐' } ]; const quickActions = [ { icon: '👤', title: 'Member Login', link: '/login', color: '#3498db' }, { icon: '📝', title: 'Register', link: '/register', color: '#27ae60' }, { icon: '🔍', title: 'Find a Doctor', link: '/find-doctor', color: '#e74c3c' }, { icon: '💊', title: 'Medicine Formulary', link: '/formulary', color: '#f39c12' }, { icon: '📞', title: '24/7 Support', link: '/contact', color: '#9b59b6' }, { icon: '🏥', title: 'Find a Facility', link: '/facilities', color: '#1abc9c' } ]; const services = [ { name: 'iGo Wellness', icon: '🏃', link: '/igo' }, { name: 'MedLabs', icon: '🔬', link: '/labs' }, { name: 'Dental Care', icon: '🦷', link: '/dental' }, { name: 'Optometry', icon: '👓', link: '/optical' }, { name: 'Dialysis', icon: '💉', link: '/dialysis' }, { name: 'Pharmacies', icon: '💊', link: '/pharmacy' }, { name: 'Rescue Services', icon: '🚑', link: '/rescue' }, { name: 'Cimas Care', icon: '❤️', link: '/cimas-care' } ]; const scrollToPlans = () => { document.getElementById('plans-section')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Your Health, Our Priority

Comprehensive healthcare solutions with fingerprint security. Access quality medical care when and where you need it.

{/* Sensor Status */}
{loading ? 'Checking sensor...' : status.connected ? 'Fingerprint Sensor Ready' : 'Fingerprint Sensor Optional'}
{/* Quick Actions Grid */}

Quick Access

{quickActions.map((action, index) => (
navigate(action.link)} style={{ borderTopColor: action.color }} >
{action.icon}

{action.title}

))}
{/* Health Plans Section */}

Healthcare Plans

Choose the plan that best fits your needs and budget

{healthPlans.map(plan => ( ))}

{plan.icon}

{plan.name}

{plan.tagline}

{plan.price}

{plan.description}

    {plan.features.map((feature, idx) => (
  • ✓ {feature}
    • ))}
))}
{/* Services Section */}

Our Services

Comprehensive healthcare services under one roof

{services.map((service, index) => (
navigate(service.link)} >
{service.icon}

{service.name}

))}
{/* Features Section */}

Why Choose Us

Fingerprint Security

Access your health records securely with biometric authentication

Regional Coverage

Coverage across SADC region, sub-Saharan Africa, and India

⚡

24/7 Emergency Support

Round-the-clock assistance for medical emergencies

📱

Mobile App Access

Manage your health records anytime, anywhere

{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to take control of your health?

Join thousands of members who trust us with their healthcare needs

{/* Footer */}

Secure, accessible healthcare for everyone.

); }; export default HomePage;
